name: @gohugo-ananke/template-hugo-mod
description: Hugo Module based template repository for the [Ananke theme](https://github.com/gohugo-ananke/ananke) for [GoHugo](https://gohugo.io/).

scripts.update: hugo mod get -u ./... && hugo mod tidy

author: Patrick Kollitsch <davidsneighbourdev+gh@gmail.com>
